title: Startup Founders Urge Trump Not to Shut Off Chinese Open Weight AI - Slashdot
excerpt: Nearly 200 Silicon Valley companies, including Proton and Y Combinator, are urging the Trump administration not to block U.S. access to Chinese open-weight AI models or risk crippling the next generation of U.S. startups. Politico reports: On Wednesday, the newly-formed Little Tech Association sent...
content_html:
Nearly 200 Silicon Valley companies, including Proton and Y Combinator, are urging the Trump administration not to block U.S. access to Chinese open-weight AI models or risk crippling the next generation of U.S. startups. Politico reports: On Wednesday, the newly-formed Little Tech Association sent letters to President Donald Trump, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and others in the administration with its appeal, marking the first coordinated effort by Silicon Valley's wider influential startup community to weigh in on one of the Trump administration's most closely watched AI debates. At issue: whether Washington should restrict access to increasingly powerful open-weight -- meaning, AI models whose weights are publicly available -- AI models released by Chinese companies such as Moonshot AI and Alibaba.

"American leadership requires two things: world-leading American open-weight models and continued access for U.S. builders to open models already available worldwide," the startup founders wrote in the letter (PDF) obtained by POLITICO, also sent to Office of Science and Technology Policy Director Michael Kratsios. Instead of broad prohibitions, they argue the government should adopt targeted safeguards.

And they warn that banning Americans from downloading Chinese open-weight models wouldn't stop their proliferation -- but would weaken U.S. startups. "There'll be hundreds of companies that instantly die," said Suhail Doshi, founder of AI infrastructure startup Particle and a member of the association, which POLITICO first wrote about exclusively, in an interview. "It's great for Anthropic. We're all going to have to spend money on Anthropic."

Last week, the Beijing-based AI company "Moonshot" released a massive new model that reset the AI race overnight, immediately vaulting into the top tier of global AI, beating Anthropic's Fable 5 and OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol in front-end coding tests.

China's Xi Jinping also used his first appearance at China's World AI Conference to promote a vision of low-cost, broadly accessible AI and call for international cooperation rather than technological rivalry.

Nearly 200 Silicon Valley companies, including Proton and Y Combinator, are urging the Trump administration not to block U.S. access to Chinese open-weight AI models or risk crippling the next generation of U.S. startups. Politico reports: On Wednesday, the newly-formed Little Tech Association sent letters to President Donald Trump, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and others in the administration with its appeal, marking the first coordinated effort by Silicon Valley's wider influential startup community to weigh in on one of the Trump administration's most closely watched AI debates. At issue: whether Washington should restrict access to increasingly powerful open-weight -- meaning, AI models whose weights are publicly available -- AI models released by Chinese companies such as Moonshot AI and Alibaba.

"American leadership requires two things: world-leading American open-weight models and continued access for U.S. builders to open models already available worldwide," the startup founders wrote in the letter (PDF) obtained by POLITICO, also sent to Office of Science and Technology Policy Director Michael Kratsios. Instead of broad prohibitions, they argue the government should adopt targeted safeguards.

And they warn that banning Americans from downloading Chinese open-weight models wouldn't stop their proliferation -- but would weaken U.S. startups. "There'll be hundreds of companies that instantly die," said Suhail Doshi, founder of AI infrastructure startup Particle and a member of the association, which POLITICO first wrote about exclusively, in an interview. "It's great for Anthropic. We're all going to have to spend money on Anthropic."

Last week, the Beijing-based AI company "Moonshot" released a massive new model that reset the AI race overnight, immediately vaulting into the top tier of global AI, beating Anthropic's Fable 5 and OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol in front-end coding tests.

sentences.en: Nearly 200 Silicon Valley companies, including Proton and Y Combinator, are urging the Trump administration not to block U.S. access to Chinese open-weight AI models or risk crippling the next generation of U.S. startups.
sentences.zh: 包括 Proton 和 Y Combinator 在内的近 200 家硅谷公司敦促特朗普政府不要阻止美国使用中国开放权重人工智能模型，否则可能会导致下一代美国初创企业陷入瘫痪。

sentences.en: Politico reports: On Wednesday, the newly-formed Little Tech Association sent letters to President Donald Trump, Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick and others in the administration with its appeal, marking the first coordinated effort by Silicon Valley's wider influential startup community to weigh in on one of the Trump administration's most closely watched AI debates.
sentences.zh: Politico 报道：周三，新成立的小型科技协会向唐纳德·特朗普总统、商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克和其他政府官员发出了呼吁书，这标志着硅谷影响力更广泛的初创企业社区首次协调努力，参与特朗普政府最受关注的人工智能辩论之一。

sentences.en: At issue: whether Washington should restrict access to increasingly powerful open-weight -- meaning, AI models whose weights are publicly available -- AI models released by Chinese companies such as Moonshot AI and Alibaba.
sentences.zh: 争论的焦点是：华盛顿是否应该限制使用日益强大的开放权重——即权重公开的人工智能模型——由登月人工智能和阿里巴巴等中国公司发布的人工智能模型。

sentences.en: "American leadership requires two things: world-leading American open-weight models and continued access for U.S. builders to open models already available worldwide," the startup founders wrote in the letter (PDF) obtained by POLITICO, also sent to Office of Science and Technology Policy Director Michael Kratsios.
sentences.zh: “美国的领导地位需要两件事：世界领先的美国开放重量模型，以及美国建筑商继续获得全球已有的开放模型，”初创公司创始人在 POLITICO 获得的信中写道（PDF），该信也发送给科学技术政策办公室主任 Michael Kratsios。

sentences.en: Instead of broad prohibitions, they argue the government should adopt targeted safeguards.
sentences.zh: 他们认为政府不应采取广泛的禁令，而应采取有针对性的保障措施。

sentences.en: And they warn that banning Americans from downloading Chinese open-weight models wouldn't stop their proliferation -- but would weaken U.S. startups.
sentences.zh: 他们警告说，禁止美国人下载中国开放重量模型并不能阻止其扩散，反而会削弱美国初创企业的实力。

sentences.en: "There'll be hundreds of companies that instantly die," said Suhail Doshi, founder of AI infrastructure startup Particle and a member of the association, which POLITICO first wrote about exclusively, in an interview.
sentences.zh: 人工智能基础设施初创公司 Particle 的创始人、该协会成员 Suhail Doshi 表示：“将会有数百家公司立即消亡。”POLITICO 在接受采访时首次独家报道了该协会。

sentences.en: We're all going to have to spend money on Anthropic."
sentences.zh: 我们都得在 Anthropic 上花钱。”

sentences.en: Last week, the Beijing-based AI company "Moonshot" released a massive new model that reset the AI race overnight, immediately vaulting into the top tier of global AI, beating Anthropic's Fable 5 and OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol in front-end coding tests.
sentences.zh: 上周，总部位于北京的人工智能公司“Moonshot”发布了一个大规模的新模型，一夜之间重新启动了人工智能竞赛，立即跃居全球人工智能第一梯队，在前端编码测试中击败了 Anthropic 的 Fable 5 和 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.6 Sol。

Instead of broad prohibitions, they argue the government should adopt targeted safeguards.

sentences.zh: 他们认为政府不应采取广泛的禁令，而应采取有针对性的保障措施。

"There'll be hundreds of companies that instantly die," said Suhail Doshi, founder of AI infrastructure startup Particle and a member of the association, which POLITICO first wrote about exclusively, in an interview. "It's great for Anthropic. We're all going to have to spend money on Anthropic."

sentences.en: We're all going to have to spend money on Anthropic."
sentences.zh: 我们都得在 Anthropic 上花钱。”

blocks.html_en: China's Xi Jinping also used his first appearance at China's World AI Conference to promote a vision of low-cost, broadly accessible AI and call for international cooperation rather than technological rivalry.

sentences.en: China's Xi Jinping also used his first appearance at China's World AI Conference to promote a vision of low-cost, broadly accessible AI and call for international cooperation rather than technological rivalry.
sentences.zh: 中国习近平还在中国世界人工智能大会上首次亮相，宣扬低成本、广泛使用人工智能的愿景，并呼吁国际合作而不是技术竞争。

content_html_zh:
包括 Proton 和 Y Combinator 在内的近 200 家硅谷公司敦促特朗普政府不要阻止美国使用中国开放权重人工智能模型，否则可能会导致下一代美国初创企业陷入瘫痪。 Politico 报道：周三，新成立的小型科技协会向唐纳德·特朗普总统、商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克和其他政府官员发出了呼吁书，这标志着硅谷影响力更广泛的初创企业社区首次协调努力，参与特朗普政府最受关注的人工智能辩论之一。 争论的焦点是：华盛顿是否应该限制使用日益强大的开放权重——即权重公开的人工智能模型——由登月人工智能和阿里巴巴等中国公司发布的人工智能模型。 “美国的领导地位需要两件事：世界领先的美国开放重量模型，以及美国建筑商继续获得全球已有的开放模型，”初创公司创始人在 POLITICO 获得的信中写道（PDF），该信也发送给科学技术政策办公室主任 Michael Kratsios。 他们认为政府不应采取广泛的禁令，而应采取有针对性的保障措施。 他们警告说，禁止美国人下载中国开放重量模型并不能阻止其扩散，反而会削弱美国初创企业的实力。 人工智能基础设施初创公司 Particle 的创始人、该协会成员 Suhail Doshi 表示：“将会有数百家公司立即消亡。”POLITICO 在接受采访时首次独家报道了该协会。 “这对 Anthropic 来说非常棒。 我们都得在 Anthropic 上花钱。” 上周，总部位于北京的人工智能公司“Moonshot”发布了一个大规模的新模型，一夜之间重新启动了人工智能竞赛，立即跃居全球人工智能第一梯队，在前端编码测试中击败了 Anthropic 的 Fable 5 和 OpenAI 的 GPT-5.6 Sol。

中国习近平还在中国世界人工智能大会上首次亮相，宣扬低成本、广泛使用人工智能的愿景，并呼吁国际合作而不是技术竞争。
